attributes.description: Cost breakdown by SKU, deployment, and tier. Shows total billing, cost by component, and deployment cost comparison.

query.esql:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| WHERE (?dg_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, deployment_group))
| WHERE (?deployment_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?deployment_selected, deployment_name))
| WHERE (?cost_category_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_category_selected, cost_category))
| WHERE (?cost_type_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_type_selected, cost_type))
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON @timestamp >= conf_start_date AND @timestamp <= conf_end_date
| EVAL total_chargeable_units_value = COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0),
    deployment = CONCAT(deployment_name, " (", LEFT(deployment_id, 6), ")")
| STATS `Normalized cost` = SUM(total_chargeable_units_value) BY @timestamp, deployment
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 5000

FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| WHERE (?dg_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, deployment_group))
| WHERE (?deployment_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?deployment_selected, deployment_name))
| WHERE (?cost_category_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_category_selected, cost_category))
| WHERE (?cost_type_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_type_selected, cost_type))
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON @timestamp >= conf_start_date AND @timestamp <= conf_end_date
| EVAL total_chargeable_units_value = COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0),
    deployment = CONCAT(deployment_name, " (", LEFT(deployment_id, 6), ")")
| STATS `Normalized cost` = SUM(total_chargeable_units_value) BY @timestamp, deployment
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 5000

embeddableConfig.description: Full deployment bill: the sum of ALL billing SKUs (data tiers, ML, Kibana, snapshots, data transfer and on-prem nodes) converted at the configured rate. This is the highest-level total. Tier and data-stream panels show only the allocatable data-tier pool, so they sum to less than this figure.
embeddableConfig.title: Total Cloud Billing Over Time

embeddableConfig.title: Normalized cost trend by deployment group

params.markdown:
**Source:** `billing_cluster_cost_lookup` — full invoice, all SKUs.

Cost is normalized using the configured chargeable-unit rate. Groups are derived from the `chargeback_group` tag on ESS deployments. Totals in this section match the full deployment bill shown above.

query.esql:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| WHERE (?dg_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, deployment_group))
| WHERE (?deployment_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?deployment_selected, deployment_name))
| WHERE (?cost_category_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_category_selected, cost_category))
| WHERE (?cost_type_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_type_selected, cost_type))
| EVAL ts = @timestamp
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON ts >= conf_start_date AND ts <= conf_end_date
| STATS `Normalized cost` = SUM(COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0)) BY deployment_group
| RENAME deployment_group AS `Deployment Group`
| SORT `Normalized cost` DESC

FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| WHERE (?dg_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, deployment_group))
| WHERE (?deployment_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?deployment_selected, deployment_name))
| WHERE (?cost_category_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_category_selected, cost_category))
| WHERE (?cost_type_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_type_selected, cost_type))
| EVAL ts = @timestamp
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON ts >= conf_start_date AND ts <= conf_end_date
| STATS `Normalized cost` = SUM(COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0)) BY deployment_group
| RENAME deployment_group AS `Deployment Group`
| SORT `Normalized cost` DESC

embeddableConfig.title: Normalized cost share by deployment group and cost category

params.markdown:
**Source:** `billing_cluster_cost_lookup` — full invoice, filtered to SKUs with a classified `cost_type`.

Billing components (`cost_type`) are derived from the ESS SKU string: data tiers (datahot/datacontent, datawarm, datacold, datafrozen), platform (ml, kibana, apm), data-transfer, snapshots, and on-premises nodes. FinOps categories (`cost_category`) group these into broader buckets: data_tier, platform, transfer, snapshot, onprem, other.

⚠️ If any SKUs could not be classified (`cost_type IS NULL`), those rows are excluded — totals here may be slightly lower than the full bill above.

query.esql:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| WHERE cost_type IS NOT NULL
| WHERE (?dg_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, deployment_group))
| WHERE (?deployment_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?deployment_selected, deployment_name))
| WHERE (?cost_category_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_category_selected, cost_category))
| WHERE (?cost_type_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_type_selected, cost_type))
| EVAL ts = @timestamp,
    `Cost Category` = cost_category,
    `Cost Type` = cost_type,
    Deployment = deployment_name
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON ts >= conf_start_date AND ts <= conf_end_date
| STATS `Normalized cost` = SUM(COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0)) BY Deployment, `Cost Category`, `Cost Type`
| SORT `Normalized cost` DESC

FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| WHERE cost_type IS NOT NULL
| WHERE (?dg_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, deployment_group))
| WHERE (?deployment_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?deployment_selected, deployment_name))
| WHERE (?cost_category_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_category_selected, cost_category))
| WHERE (?cost_type_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_type_selected, cost_type))
| EVAL ts = @timestamp,
    `Cost Category` = cost_category,
    `Cost Type` = cost_type,
    Deployment = deployment_name
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON ts >= conf_start_date AND ts <= conf_end_date
| STATS `Normalized cost` = SUM(COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0)) BY Deployment, `Cost Category`, `Cost Type`
| SORT `Normalized cost` DESC

embeddableConfig.description: Full deployment bill: the sum of ALL billing SKUs (data tiers, ML, Kibana, snapshots, data transfer and on-prem nodes) converted at the configured rate. This is the highest-level total. Tier and data-stream panels show only the allocatable data-tier pool, so they sum to less than this figure.
embeddableConfig.title: Normalized cost by billing component and deployment

embeddableConfig.description:
Cost broken down by Deployment, and Billable component (Cost type).
Cost Type shows individual SKU families (datahot/datacontent, datawarm, ml, kibana, snapshots, …).
embeddableConfig.title: Normalized cost share by cost type

config.esql_query:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| WHERE (?dg_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, deployment_group))
| STATS COUNT(*) BY deployment_name
| KEEP deployment_name
| SORT deployment_name
config.title: Deployment name

config.esql_query:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| WHERE (?dg_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, deployment_group))
| WHERE (?deployment_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?deployment_selected, deployment_name))
| WHERE (?cost_category_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_category_selected, cost_category))
| WHERE cost_type IS NOT NULL
| STATS COUNT(*) BY cost_type
| KEEP cost_type
| SORT cost_type
config.title: Cost type

config.esql_query:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| WHERE (?dg_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, deployment_group))
| WHERE (?deployment_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?deployment_selected, deployment_name))
| WHERE cost_category IS NOT NULL
| STATS COUNT(*) BY cost_category
| KEEP cost_category
| SORT cost_category
config.title: Cost category

config.esql_query:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| WHERE deployment_group != ""
| STATS COUNT(*) BY deployment_group
| KEEP deployment_group
| SORT deployment_group
config.title: Deployment group
